name: Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix lemon juice with the grated apples.
3. Place one-third of the bread in the bottom of a non-stick 8 x 8 baking dish (spray with cooking spray if needed).
4. Add 1 cup of apples, 1/4 cup cottage cheese, half of the raisins, and some cinnamon to the bread.
5. In a separate bowl, blend skim milk, dry milk, egg whites, and sugar until smooth.
6. Pour 1 cup of this mixture over the ingredients in the baking dish.
7. Repeat layers with bread, apples, and liquid, finishing with bread.
8. Pour remaining milk mixture over top, sprinkle with cinnamon, and dot with applesauce.
9. Let pudding sit for 20 minutes or longer.
10. Bake, covered, for 45 minutes.
11. Let it stand for 10 to 20 minutes at room temperature before serving.
